folio.label: 120r
folio.l: That ©ongest was , and higút Canacee
But for to telle ©ow , al hire beaute
It litú nougút in my tonge , or my konnynge
I dar nougút vndertake , so heigú a thynge
Myn englyssú eke is , insufficient
It must ben a Rethor , excellent
That coude hise coloås , longyngö for that art
If he shulde hire discryuen , euäy part
I nam noon suche , I mot speke as I can
And so byfel , that whan this Cambiuscan
Hadde twenty wynter , born his Diademe
As he was wont , fro ©ere to ©ere I deme
He lete the feste , of his Natiuitee
Do crien thurgú out Sarray , his Citee
The last Ydus of Marcú , after the ©er
Phebus the Sonne , ful iolyf was and cler
For he was ney , his exaltaciou~
In martes face , & in his manciou~
In Aries , the coleryk hote signe
Ful lusty was the wedir , & benygne
For whicú the foules , ageyn the sonne shene
What for the sesou~ , & the ©onge greene
Ful loude songen , in here affeccions
Hem semed haue geten hem , ¸teccions
Ageyns the swerd of wynter , kene & colde
This Cambiuscan , of whicú I haue ©ow tolde
In real vestiment , syt on his deys
Witú Diademe ful heigú , in his paleys
And halt his feste , so solempne & so riche
That in this world , ne was æäe noon it liche
Of whicú , if I shal tellen , al the array
Than wold it occupie , a someres day
And eke it nedetú nat , for to deuyse
At euäy cours , the ordre of here seruyse
I wyl nougút tellen , of here straunge sewes

note.notetxt: 60The ink in this page is dark brown.ODR

folio.l: Ne of here Swannes , ne here heronsewes
I wyl nougút tarien ©ow , for it is pryme
And for it is no fruyt , but losse of tyme
Vn to my first , I wyl haue myn retours
¢ And so byfel after , the thridde cours

note.notetxt: 68the paraph is blue. Is it fainted? Double check.ODR

folio.l: Whil that this kyngö syt thus , in his nobleye
Herkenyngö his Mynstralles , here thynges pleye
Biforn hi~ at the bord , deliciously
